name: CarbonNet: How Computer Vision Plays a Role in Climate Change? Application: Learning Geomechanics from Subsurface Geometry of CCS to Mitigate Global Warming
summary: arXiv:2403.06025v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce a new approach using computer vision to predict the land surface displacement from subsurface geometry images for Carbon Captu...
description: arXiv:2403.06025v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce a new approach using computer vision to predict the land surface displacement from subsurface geometry images for Carbon Capture and Sequestration (CCS). CCS has been proved to be a key component for a carbon neutral society. However, scientists see there are challenges along the way including the high computational cost due...
author: Wei Chen, Yunan Li, Yuan Tian
